title: Sushi Broil Pilaf
description: A savory and juicy Portuguese dish featuring sushi rice, cooked with a broil to add depth of flavor, suitable for dairy-free diets.
instructions: Rinse sushi rice with cold water and soak in the vegetable broth for at least 30 minutes.
Drain the soaked rice and place it in a pot. Add more water to cover the rice, bring to a boil, then reduce heat, cover, and simmer until all liquid is absorbed (about 15-20 minutes).
Stir in finely chopped shallots into the hot cooked sushi rice.
Preheat oven broiler according to manufacturer’s instructions. Spread the mixture evenly on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Broil for about 3 minutes, or until lightly browned and fragrant.
Sprinkle leaves of Asian Parsley over the dish before serving as a garnish.
